title: mace to pan
description: replaces the mace model and texture to make it look like a frying pan
body:
replaces the mace model and texture with one that looks like a pan \
![pan](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K4wWe1om/images/c553cd566032636d8033f37b2697475b693fd61c.gif) \
+replaces the mace hit sounds with the [frying pan sounds](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=08EqQPIvHOU) from **team fortress 2**


*ᵖᵃᶜᵏ ʷᶦᵗʰ ᵘᵍᵃⁿᵈᵃⁿ ᵏⁿᵘᶜᵏˡᵉˢ ˢᵉᵃˡ ᵒᶠ ᵃᵖᵖʳᵒᵛᵃˡ
